chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D- 4645 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 13.01.2025 Mr. Irshad Ali Bhatti, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Kamran, Asstt. Advocate General Sindh. Petition seeks regularization of service in Government of Sindh on the pretext that the petitioners have been temporary employed since 2020. No document of entitlement could be demonstrated before the Court. Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh states that the annexures filed are forged, fabricated and prima facie devoid of any date or stamp. It is further added that the assertion of the petitioners are alien to the annexures placed on record. In mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined vide judgments of Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan reported as 2024 SCMR 527 (Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq & Others), Full bench of this Court in Muhammad Arif vs. Federation of Pakistan (CPD 875 of 2020 and connected petitions) judgment dated 2.04.2024 and Division Bench of this Court reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 (Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others) these petitions are found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Nadeem/PA
